steps.title: Track conclusion and method
steps.content: The text begins with the study's conclusion: thinking about values before discussion can make people more polite. It then explains the experimental and control groups and reports the result that led Havel's team to that conclusion.

steps.title: Reject misread purposes
steps.content: Choice A invents a widely held belief. Choice B invents surprise from the researchers. Choice C says the text suggests improvements to the study design, but the passage only describes the design and finding. The answer is D.
